for p in ['governance/workspaces/development','governance/workspaces/testing','governance/workspaces/main','governance/product_repositories','governance/testing']:
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
workspace_registry = {
  'status':'active',
  'workspaces':[
    {'id':'WS-DEV-001','type':'development_workspace','path':'governance/workspaces/development','rule':'internal contours write here first'},
    {'id':'WS-TEST-001','type':'testing_workspace','path':'governance/workspaces/testing','rule':'curator assigns one internal contour to test combined result'},
    {'id':'WS-MAIN-001','type':'main_workspace','path':'governance/workspaces/main','rule':'only PASS artifacts are promoted here'}
  ],
  'promotion_rule':'development -> testing -> main after PASS'
}
Path('governance/state/workspace_registry.json').write_text(json.dumps(workspace_registry, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/workspaces/development/README.md').write_text('# Development workspace\n\nAssigned internal contours work here before testing.\n', encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/workspaces/testing/README.md').write_text('# Testing workspace\n\nCurator assigns one internal contour to perform integration and testing here. Testing is a temporary assigned function, not a permanent separate contour.\n', encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/workspaces/main/README.md').write_text('# Main workspace\n\nOnly verified PASS artifacts are promoted here.\n', encoding='utf-8')
product_registry = {
  'status':'active',
  'purpose':'register product repositories governed by managing contour',
  'governance':'product repositories obey rule registry and send experience feedback to managing contour',
  'capabilities':['build','support','repair','upgrade','extend','learn_from_feedback'],
  'repositories':[]
}
Path('governance/state/product_repository_registry.json').write_text(json.dumps(product_registry, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/product_repositories/BEM880_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_MODEL.md').write_text('# BEM-880 Product repository model\n\nStatus: active\n\nProduct repositories are client/product implementation spaces. The managing contour builds, supports, repairs, upgrades, extends, and learns from them.\n\nFeedback from product repositories is cleaned by curator routes and can update the rule registry.\n', encoding='utf-8')
testing_policy = {'status':'active','testing_function':'assigned_by_curator','default_assignment':'WRK-C3 unless WRK-C3 authored the candidate, then curator assigns a non-authoring contour','workspace':'governance/workspaces/testing','pass_required_for_main_workspace':True}
Path('governance/state/testing_policy.json').write_text(json.dumps(testing_policy, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/testing/BEM880_ASSIGNED_TESTING_POLICY.md').write_text('# BEM-880 Assigned testing policy\n\nTesting is an assigned function in the testing workspace. It is not a permanent separate testing contour.\n\nCurator chooses a non-authoring internal contour when independent review is needed.\n', encoding='utf-8')
tr = Path('governance/state/task_registry.json')
if tr.exists():
    data = json.loads(tr.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for task in data.get('tasks', []):
        if task.get('owner') == 'WRK-C3':
            task['status'] = 'completed'
    data['status'] = 'contours_completed'
    tr.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/workspace_registry.json','governance/workspaces/development/README.md','governance/workspaces/testing/README.md','governance/workspaces/main/README.md','governance/state/product_repository_registry.json','governance/product_repositories/BEM880_PRODUCT_REPOSITORY_MODEL.md','governance/state/testing_policy.json','governance/testing/BEM880_ASSIGNED_TESTING_POLICY.md','governance/state/task_registry.json'])
